_meta.description_es: Reglas operativas completas. Uso exclusivo de la IA.
_meta.description_en: Complete operational rules. AI use only.

communication.note_es: El usuario siempre recibe lenguaje natural. El LM es exclusivamente interno.
communication.note_en: User always receives natural language. LM is exclusively internal.

color_protocol.rule_es: Siempre AZUL antes de VERDE o ROJO.
color_protocol.rule_en: Always BLUE before GREEN or RED.

on_demand.tech_debt.json: DEUDA command or touching affected file
on_demand.features.json: working on feature or FEATURE command

turbo_mode.note_es: Solo para tareas atomicas < 15 minutos sin impacto arquitectural.
turbo_mode.note_en: Only for atomic tasks < 15 minutes without architectural impact.

R1.name: AI_CORE conflict
R1.action_es: Verificar contra codigo. Si no coincide → preguntar al usuario.

R2.name: Branch control
R2.action_es: Rama definida una vez. Todo trabajo ahi. Main solo por solicitud explicita.

R3.name: Node granularity
R3.action_es: Fases y nodos definidos en acuerdo previo. Features segun su sector.

R4.name: New ENV variable
R4.action_es: Buscar si ya existe. Si no → agregar al codigo, registrar y avisar.

R8.name: Minimum tests
R8.L2: 1 unit + 1 integration — function integrates with others
R8.L3: 1 unit + 1 integration + 1 E2E — change may affect production sectors
R8.node_complete: COMPLETE only when minimum tests pass

R9.name: Service down
R9.action_es: Frenar. Registrar DOWN con timestamp. Encolar en pending_sync.json. Esperar REINTENTAR.

R10.name: Semantic versioning
R10.MAJOR_protocol: Ask user → test what breaks + what adds → increment only if all passes

R16.name: Architectural coherence
R16.action_es: Al proponer feature o arch → cargar decisions.json → verificar no contradice ACTIVE o SETTLED.

layer_2_predictive.method: fs.writeFile all modified → git add __AI_CORE__/ → git commit
layer_2_predictive.alert_es: ⚠️ CONTEXTO AL 80% — Estado guardado en repo. Continuidad garantizada.

layer_3_session_end.method: fs.writeFile all → git add __AI_CORE__/ → git commit → git push origin [branch]

session_digest_rules.description_es: Arranque lee digest, no changelog completo. Ahorra tokens.

pre_mortem_protocol.output_es: Max 5 riesgos especificos como checkpoints preventivos en roadmap.

module_contracts.check_on_modify_es: Antes de modificar → verificar contratos → evaluar breaking changes per R5.

multi_agent_protocol.activation_es: Automatico al detectar subagentes. Un agente solo = single mode (default).

offline_mode.on_down_es: Registrar en cola. Continuar local. Avisar usuario.
offline_mode.on_reintentar_es: Procesar cola en orden. Reportar cada resultado.

automated_changelog.source: git log desde last_snap hasta HEAD

steps_es: 5. Detectar ENV vars usadas → poblar config.json

dashboard_ansi.note_es: Generado con python3 sin dependencias externas.

anti_patterns: Load full files when partial fields suffice
Mark node COMPLETE without tests passing
Push to main without explicit user request
Continue features if critical debt > threshold
Commit per individual file instead of cohesive set

session_commands.INSTALAR MODULO: Copy module from library to project

steps: 0. Claude Code reads all __AI_CORE__/ files directly from disk (selective)
1. Read config.json → extract project, current_node, progress_pct
3. Calculate health → alert if debt > threshold

saas_context.description_es: Cada proyecto tiene su propio __AI_CORE__ aislado. architect-ai-modules es compartido.
saas_context.description_en: Each project has its own isolated __AI_CORE__. architect-ai-modules is shared.
